gateway_token: <gateway bearer token, sent as Authorization: Bearer. OpenClaw backend: the /v1/chat/completions token. zeroclaw / zeroclaw_ws backends: the zc_... paired token from `zeroclaw gateway get-paircode --new` + POST /pair>
elevenlabs_api_key: <ElevenLabs API key (sk_...); leave empty if not using the ElevenLabs provider>
deepgram_api_key: <Deepgram API key; leave empty if not using the Deepgram provider. Overridden by the DEEPGRAM_API_KEY env var if set.>
telegram_bot_token: <Telegram bot token (123456:ABC...) used ONLY by the MCP sidecar's send_voice_telegram tool. Leave empty if you don't deliver voice messages to Telegram. Note: this is the cleartext token — keep it duplicated here only if voice-bridge.secrets.json is also gitignored and chmod 600.>
